title: bupleurum scorzonerifolium subsp. angustissimum
intro: Bupleurum scorzonerifolium subsp. angustissimum, also known as Narrow-leaf Hare's Ear, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum scorzonerifolium subsp. angustissimum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney problems, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is commonly combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
